compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Why
Workflows need a library of deterministic building blocks, including the gate step that
demonstrates pass/fail logic (unsecured here; cryptographic security is epic 8a1c).

## What
- A registry of scripted steps: fetch ticket/commits/epic-graph, render context, gate (plain
  Python), comment verdict, plain tag, set fields.
- All side-effecting scripted steps are idempotent via the (run_id, step_id) marker.

## Scope
- In: deterministic step registry.
- Out: cryptographic gate security / signing / protected tags (epic 8a1c).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Step registry with the listed built-in steps.
- [ ] Side-effecting steps are idempotent under re-run.
- [ ] An unsecured gate step evaluates findings vs a versioned policy.

file_impact.reason: scripted step registry incl unsecured gate

compiled_state.title: WS-E: Scripted-step library (deterministic built-ins incl. unsecured gate)
